name: Acceleration
description: Applies acceleration to velocity, then velocity to position each frame
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Acceleration

Applies acceleration to velocity, then velocity to position each frame

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ax` | Acceleration X | `number` | `0` | - |
| `ay` | Acceleration Y | `number` | `0` | - |
| `az` | Acceleration Z | `number` | `0` | - |
| `vx` | Velocity X | `number` | `0` | - |
| `vy` | Velocity Y | `number` | `0` | - |
| `vz` | Velocity Z | `number` | `0` | - |
| `damping` | Damping | `number` | `0` | - |
| `maxSpeed` | Max Speed | `number` | `100` | - |
